params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: Cycle 94 R-23: mistral verify after path REVERT to '/'. ROOT CAUSE IDENTIFIED via 602 etap.log inspection: my prior path narrow to '/api/chat' (Stage 2 only) was a misdiagnosis — Stage 2 carries NO prompt text (per #594 capture); prompt is in Stage 1 /api/trpc/message.newChat. With path='/api/chat', APF saw Stage 2 only (no PII keyword) → no block. Reverting path to '/' should restore Stage 1 intercept where #596 originally worked. Envelope reverted to original mistral_trpc_sse (875B tRPC batch JSON shape).

devtools_check_instructions: - /api/trpc/message.newChat?batch=1 POST → did APF intercept (response = our SSE event:data: with chatId synthetic)?
- /api/chat POST → does it fire after newChat? if newChat intercepted → /api/chat may 4xx or hang
5. SUCCESS: warning text rendered in chat
6. PARTIAL: APF intercepts newChat but UI shows error/empty/Error 6002 (envelope shape mismatch but at least intercept fires — protects PII)
7. FAIL: no intercept anywhere, full PII analysis renders (means path revert didn't help; deeper engine issue)
8. Capture etap.log timestamp + verify [APF:block] event for service=mistral fires this run

notes: Cycle 94 R-23 mistral path REVERT verify. Critical for engine intercept layer hypothesis isolation.
